title: /int
text: /int While copying or importing data, display a message that reports the number of records copied at an interval that is expressed as a number of occurrences. By default, the interval is 100. /int = MessageInterval Used With /cpy /imp Parameters MessageInterval —frequency with which a message is displayed, expressed as a number of occurrences. Default is 100. Description Use this switch to specify another interval. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
